ui.notification-test: Isso é uma notificação de teste :3

warning.title: Nota
warning.text:
Contribuidores de idioma<cr>NÃO SÃO</c> desenvolvedores do <co>QOLMod</c>, eles <cr>não podem</c> adicionar coisas ou corrigir falhas.
Por favor <cr>não</c> mande mensagens para os contribuidores de idioma corrigir falhas.

add-preset-exist.title: Predefinição de Speedhack
add-preset-exist.text: Já existe uma pré-definição com o valor <cc>%s</c>

font-select.title: Selecionar fonte
font-select.japanese-supported: Essa fonte suporta Hiragana, Katakana e Kanji (Japonês)
font-select.russian-supported: Essa fonte suporta o alfabeto cirílico (Russo)
font-select.korean-supported: Essa fonte suporta o alfabeto coreano (Coreano)
font-select.chinese-supported: Essa fonte suporta o sistema de escrita Hanzi (Chinês)

create-custom-reward.first-use-warning:
<cr>Aviso</c>
Usar essa ferramenta vai alterar permanentemente seu arquivo de salvamento, isso pode resultar no seu banimento do leaderboard.
<cl>Use por sua conta em risco!</c>

labels.none-added-hint:
Nenhum rótulo adicionado.
Você pode <cc>adicionar</c> rótulos com os 
<cl>botões</c> no lado <cp>direito</c>.

uncomplete-level.no-level-found: Nenhum <cc>nível</c> encontrado, tente abrir a página de um <cc>nível</c>.
uncomplete-level.found-confirmation:
Você tem certeza que deseja descompletar o nível <cc>%s</c>.
Isso <cr>não pode ser desfeito</c>

iconic.fine-outline-missing-error: Isso requer que o mod <cc>Fine Outline</c> feito por <cp>Alphalaneous</c> seja instalado.

names.chest-unlock-bypass: Desbloquear Baús da Sala do Tesouro
names.no-spider-dash: Sem Efeito de Dash da Spider
names.plat-jump-anim: Sem animação de Pulo no Platformer

descriptions.safe-mode: Disables all level progress and stats
descriptions.safe-mode/change-text: Changes the end screen text to make it obvious if the run is cheated
descriptions.noclip/tint-on-death: Tints the screen when you die
descriptions.show-touches: Shows a circle on the screen whenever you touch
descriptions.classic-percentage: Changes the progress bar percentage to be calculated based off position, rather than time, similar to pre 2.2
descriptions.best-in-percentage: Shows the best percentage in the progress bar
descriptions.accurate-percentage: Allows you to have any amount of decimal places in your percentage text
descriptions.hitbox-trail: Shows the trail of the player
descriptions.hitbox-trail/reset-positions-on-death: Resets the stored positions every attempt
descriptions.no-particles-adv: Disable specific particles in the game
descriptions.no-particles-adv/dash-orb-particles: Disables particles when using a dash orb
descriptions.no-particles-adv/coin-particles: Disables particles on collectible objects such as coins
descriptions.no-particles-adv/end-portal-particles: Disables the particles that come out of the end portal
descriptions.no-particles-adv/speed-change-particles: Disables the particles that play in the background when the players speed changes
descriptions.no-particles-adv/particle-objects: Disable advanced particle objects that creators placed in the editor
descriptions.no-particles: Disables all particles in the game
descriptions.no-particles/particles-in-editor: Allows particles to show in the editor
descriptions.auto-safe-mode: Automatically enables safe mode when a cheat is enabled
descriptions.trans-bg: Sets the colour for all gradient backgrounds to white
descriptions.trans-bg/only-blue:
Only changes the colour of blue backgrounds. 
Can mess up some areas like the vaults if disabled
descriptions.char-limit: Allows you to type as many letters as you want in any input field
descriptions.char-filter: Allows you to type any character in any input field
descriptions.slider-limit: Allows sliders to go beyond the limit of the slider
descriptions.slider-limit/reset-audio-variables: Resets the audio sliders to <cc>100%</c> incase it went off screen and you can't get it back.
descriptions.practice-bypass: Unlocks the Practice Music Sync button in the pause menu options
descriptions.pitch-shifter: Shift the pitch of the games audio
descriptions.speedhack/gameplay: Only enables the speedhack in gameplay and editor
descriptions.no-trans: Disables the fade transition between scenes
descriptions.music-bypass: Unlocks the menu and practice music buttons
descriptions.hide-pause-button: Hides the pause button in game, requires reopening level to apply
descriptions.frame-extrapolation: Smooths between frames by predicting where the player will be the next frame using its velocity.
descriptions.december-snow: Adds snow to the main menu during <cc>december</c>.
descriptions.syzzi.click_between_frames/soft-toggle: Toggles the "CBF Enabled" option in the cbf mod settings
descriptions.chest-unlock-bypass: Allows you to open any chest in the <cc>treasure room</c>
descriptions.startpos-switcher: Switch between start positions in the level at any time
descriptions.startpos-switcher/use-percentage: Shows the percentage that each start position is at
descriptions.startpos-switcher/hide-ui: Hides the UI and makes it non-interactable
descriptions.smart-startpos: Automatically adjusts the settings of a startpos to correctly set the gamemode, speed, gravity, etc
descriptions.custom-respawn-time: Change how long it takes to respawn
descriptions.instant-restart: Instantly restart a level when you die
descriptions.pause-quests: Adds a button to open the quests menu in the pause menu
descriptions.practice-complete: Allows you to complete a level in practice mode if you beat it in <cr>one</c> attempt
descriptions.instant-reverse: Makes the mirror portal transition instant
descriptions.pause-icon-kit: Adds a button to open the icon kit in the pause menu
descriptions.freeze-attempts: Freezes your attempt count stat and on level
descriptions.hide-player: Forces all players to be invisible
descriptions.show-player: Forces all players to be visible
descriptions.force-plat:
Force Platformer mode on all levels.
Reopen level to apply.
descriptions.conf-res: Adds a popup to confirm if you want to restart the level
descriptions.conf-prac: Adds a popup to confirm if you want to enter practice mode
descriptions.coin-tracers: Draws a line to secret / user coins in the level
descriptions.auto-practice: Automatically puts you into practice mode when you open a level
descriptions.auto-practice/demons-only: Only puts you into practice mode if the level is a demon
descriptions.auto-coins: Automatically collect coins in a level
descriptions.verify-hack: Allows you upload levels without verifying them
descriptions.smooth-editor-trail: Updates the editor trail at your screen refresh rate instead of 30 fps
descriptions.level-edit: Allows you to edit any level
descriptions.custom-star-rating: Allows you to set a custom star rating on a level
descriptions.copy-hack: Allows you to copy any level from the servers
descriptions.wave-trail-size: Change the size of the wave trail
descriptions.unlock-buttons: Visually Unlocks the greyed out buttons in the online page
descriptions.solid-wave: Makes the wave trail a solid colour
descriptions.no-wave-pulse: Stops the wave from pulsing to the music
descriptions.no-trail-blending: Disables blending on the normal player trail
descriptions.no-spider-dash: Hides the spider dash effect when you teleport
descriptions.no-ship-fire: Hides the fire behind the ship while it's flying
descriptions.no-robot-fire: Hides the fire under the robot while it's boosting
descriptions.no-blink: Disables the blinking when the player respawns
descriptions.plat-jump-anim: Disables the squish animation when jumping in <cc>platformer mode</c>
descriptions.no-lightning: Disables the lightning when touching certain portals
descriptions.no-glow:
Disables object glow.
Requires re-entering the level to apply
descriptions.no-death: Disables the death effect on the player
descriptions.no-dash-fire: Hides the fire behind your icon when using a dash orb
descriptions.no-circles-adv: Disable specific circle effects on some objects
descriptions.no-circles: Disables circle effects such as the one when you touch an orb
descriptions.longer-trail: Lengthens your player's trail length by a factor of 3x
descriptions.longer-trail/player-only: Only makes player trails longer, ignoring all other trail effects ingame
descriptions.hide-percent-after-complete: Fades out the progress bar and percentage label after a level is completed
descriptions.trail-off/wave-only: Force the trail off only when in the wave gamemode
descriptions.blur-background: Blurs the background behind the mod menu
descriptions.no-open-in-level:
Makes it so you can't open the mod menu while in a level.
Just incase you accidentally bump the tab button
descriptions.smooth-move: Moves the button smoothly to where you put it
descriptions.allow-dragging: Allows the button to be dragged
descriptions.hide-btn: Hides the button to open the mod
descriptions.save-pos: Saves the position of the button between game launches
descriptions.seperate-colour-cheat-name: Changes the colour of mod names if it is a cheat
descriptions.speedhack/music: Speedhack all sound by your speed modifier
descriptions.full-options: Replaces the mini options menu in the pause menu with the full options menu
descriptions.search/show-options: Shows mod options in the search results
descriptions.auto-song: Automatically downloads songs when you open a level
descriptions.pitch-shifter/music-only: Only changes the pitch of music
descriptions.trail-cutting: Change the fps that the trail updates at, similar to 2.1
descriptions.create-custom-reward: Creates a custom chest that gives you rewards of your choice
descriptions.noclip/player1: Disabling this allows player 1 to die with noclip on
descriptions.noclip/player2: Disabling this allows player 2 to die with noclip on
descriptions.noclip/player1/use-min-accuracy: Allows the player to die when their accuracy drops below the specified percentage
descriptions.noclip/player2/use-min-accuracy: Allows the player to die when their accuracy drops below the specified percentage
descriptions.noclip/player1/use-max-deaths: Allows the player to die when their noclip death count goes above the specified count
descriptions.noclip/player2/use-max-deaths: Allows the player to die when their noclip death count goes above the specified count
descriptions.show-hitboxes-on-death/death-object-only: Only shows the hitbox for the object you died to
descriptions.show-hitboxes-on-death/trail: Allows hitbox trail to work with show hitboxes on death
descriptions.search-on-keypress: Switches to the search tab when you press a keybind
descriptions.shortcut/restart-attempt: Restarts the current attempt if you are in a level
descriptions.shortcut/toggle-practice: Toggles practice mode if you are in a level
descriptions.safe-mode/end-screen-cheat-indicator: Shows a cheat indicator on the end screen
descriptions.tps-bypass: Allows your physics to update at a different "frame rate" than the default 240
descriptions.hitbox-trail/darken-by-age: Makes the trail become darker the older it is
descriptions.notifications: Displays a notification whenever you toggle a mod via a keybind or shortcut
descriptions.notifications/right: Displays the notifications on the right side of the screen
descriptions.notifications/blur:
Blurs the background behind the notifications.
Requires the mod <cc>Blur API</c>
descriptions.high-fps-rotation: Makes the ship rotate like it does when your fps is over 1000
descriptions.no-rot/cube: Disables rotation in the Cube gamemode
descriptions.no-rot/ship: Disables rotation in the Ship gamemode
descriptions.no-rot/jetpack: Disables rotation in the Jetpack gamemode
descriptions.no-rot/ball: Disables rotation in the Ball gamemode
descriptions.no-rot/ufo: Disables rotation in the Ufo gamemode
descriptions.no-rot/wave: Disables rotation in the Wave gamemode
descriptions.no-rot/robot: Disables rotation in the Robot gamemode
descriptions.no-rot/spider: Disables rotation in the Spider gamemode
descriptions.no-rot/swing: Disables rotation in the Swing gamemode
descriptions.no-invisible-objects: Makes fading objects show at max opacity
descriptions.hitbox-trail/click-colours: Changes the colour of the hitbox trail for the frame you click on
descriptions.hitbox-trail/hold-click-colours: Colours the hitbox trail when a click is held
descriptions.main-level-bypass: Allows you to play all the demon main levels
descriptions.shortcut/uncomplete-level: Removes all progress and completion status of a level
descriptions.shortcut/clone-level: Clones a level to your local levels
descriptions.custom-obj-limit: Removes the limit to the amount of custom objects you can have
descriptions.shortcut/open-graphics-settings: Opens the graphics settings popup, used to enable Show FPS on mobile
descriptions.fast-end-screen: Shows the end screen as soon as you get pulled into the end portal
descriptions.show-touches/use-trail: Shows a trail behind the touch circle
descriptions.show-touches/show-duration: Shows the duration that a touch went for
descriptions.hitbox-trail/no-limit: Removes the limit to the amount of positions that are saved
descriptions.safe-mode/disable-cheats-ui: Makes it so cheats literally cannot be enabled in the UI
descriptions.no-circles-adv/orb-touch: Disables the circle when you touch an orb
descriptions.no-circles-adv/orb-click: Disables the circle when you click an orb
descriptions.no-circles-adv/pad-touch: Disables the circle when you touch a pad
descriptions.no-circles-adv/gravity-portal-touch: Disables the circle when you touch a gravity portal
descriptions.no-circles-adv/gamemode-portal-touch: Disables the circle when you touch a gamemode portal
descriptions.no-circles-adv/size-portal-touch: Disables the circle when you touch a size portal
descriptions.fast-chests: Shows the close button for chests immediately
descriptions.reset-percentage-on-save: Resets the percentage when you edit an editor level
descriptions.autoclicker: Automatically clicks at a specified cps
descriptions.pitch-shifter/high-quality:
Makes the pitch shifter audio a high quality.
Disabled by default since it may use more memory
